title: Day 1: Unit 1: 新朋友与学校 - Part 1

dialogues.speaker: mom
dialogues.en: Good morning, Guangtou! Time to wake up.

dialogues.speaker: son
dialogues.en: Good morning, Mom. I am so sleepy.

quiz.question:
请选择正确的单词填空：

The ____ is very nice.
(这个【你好】非常好。)

title: Day 2: Unit 1: 新朋友与学校 - Part 2

dialogues.speaker: son
dialogues.en: It was great, Dad! I learned a lot.
dialogues.zh: 太棒了，爸爸！我学到了很多。

dialogues.speaker: daughter
dialogues.en: Look, I have a new name.

dialogues.speaker: mom
dialogues.en: Are you hungry? Dinner is ready.
dialogues.zh: 你们饿了吗？晚饭准备好了。

quiz.question:
请选择正确的单词填空：

The ____ is very nice.
(这个【名字】非常好。)

dialogues.en: Good morning, Mom. I am so sleepy.

quiz.question:
请选择正确的单词填空：

The ____ is very nice.
(这个【八】非常好。)

title: Day 59: Unit 6: 数字与游戏 - Part 9

dialogues.speaker: son
dialogues.en: It was great, Dad! I learned a lot.
dialogues.zh: 太棒了，爸爸！我学到了很多。

dialogues.speaker: daughter
dialogues.en: Look, I have a new nine.

dialogues.speaker: mom
dialogues.en: Are you hungry? Dinner is ready.
dialogues.zh: 你们饿了吗？晚饭准备好了。

title: Day 60: Unit 6: 数字与游戏 - 终极复习

dialogues.speaker: mom
dialogues.en: Come here and wash your hands.
